# Chapter 4: Data structures  (~110 pp)
- 4.1 Arrays, lists, stacks, queues (12) · 4.2 Hash tables (15) · 4.3 Trees: BST, balanced trees, B-trees (18) · 4.4 Heaps, priority queues (10) · 4.5 Graphs in memory (12) · 4.6 Persistent and immutable structures (12) · 4.7 Cache-aware data layout (15) · 4.8 Failure section: hash collisions weaponised, structural sharing pitfalls (16)
